image:image.image:caption: Photographs from the 40th Anniversary of the Summer of Love celebration at Golden Gate Park, San Francisco. September 2, 2007. Leica M8.

image:image.image:caption: Marshall Tucker Band performing at the Sausalito Art Festival. September 3, 2007. Leica M8.

image:image.image:caption: Marshall Tucker Band performing at the Sausalito Art Festival. September 3, 2007. Leica M8.

image:image.image:caption: Marshall Tucker Band performing at the Sausalito Art Festival. September 3, 2007. Leica M8.

image:image.image:caption: Marshall Tucker Band performing at the Sausalito Art Festival. September 3, 2007. Leica M8.

image:image.image:title: Marshall Tucker Band - Sausalito Art Festival, September 3, 2007 - L9523910.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Marshall Tucker Band performing at the Sausalito Art Festival. September 3, 2007. Leica M8.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9523923.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: The lobby. Leather chairs, gold records behind glass, photographs from the Robert Altman retrospective.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9523924.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Robert Altman, photographer of the Summer of Love, at his book launch party.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9523925.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Robert Altman in drag shutter. The motion is the technique.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9523929.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Robert Altman. The man who documented the counterculture from the inside.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9523940.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Movement through the hallways. Half-second exposure, available light only.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9523977.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Guitar against the redwood walls.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9523982.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Detail. Everything in this building has been touched by someone whose records you own.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9523988.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Purple light in the hallways. The Plant was famous for its waterbed floor and jacuzzi.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9523993.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: People finding each other in the colored light.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9523995.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Playing guitar in the studio. Gold records on the wall behind her.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9523997.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Standing where the magic happened. Rumours. Supernatural. Songs in the Key of Life.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524010.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: A vending machine full of Doritos in the room where Stevie Wonder recorded Songs in the Key of Life.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524011.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Settling in. The redwood walls, the low light, the warmth.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524013.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Cowboy hat in warm light.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524019.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Portrait in red. No filter, no post-processing. Just the light that was there.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524021.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: The Plant was not just a studio. It was a community.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524023.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: A woman, a guitar, and the energy of a place that remembers everything.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524029.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Two men laughing in the red light.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524064.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: The control room. Blue neon ceiling, studio monitors, mixing console.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524105.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Studio A. The famous sunburst wall, designed by Tom Hidley.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524114.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: In front of the Robert Altman retrospective.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524134.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: The guitar memorial. Instruments displayed like relics.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524135.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: The psychedelic staircase. Curved walls, deep red light.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524143.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Surrounded by history.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524148.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Hallway. Guitars on the walls, amber light, the warmth of redwood.

image:image.image:title: The Record Plant - Sausalito, September 3, 2007 - L9524155.jpg - Photograph by Chuck Jones
image:image.image:caption: Last light. The evening winding down inside a building that was fighting to survive.
